use_cases: Streaming platform user switching interface similar to Netflix
Family-friendly content filtering with individual profile selection
Shared device user identification on tablets or smart TVs
Dashboard access control for multi-tenant applications
ai_summary: A responsive profile selector component featuring a grid layout of user avatars with hover lift animations and smooth transitions. Designed for streaming platforms and multi-user applications, it supports both image URLs and React components for profile icons with full keyboard accessibility and focus states.
